rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ANTHONY VIDAK
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 12/16/19. Courtesy copies are one-sided, endorsed filed copies. [LRSF 14.6 C.] (There is no such thing as a "supplemental petition" or an "augmented supplemental petition." A supplement or an amendment to an existing petition is required to either provide additional information or materially different information, respectively. [CRC 7.3.]) A Court-appointed fiduciary is required to sign and verify his own pleadings. Endorsed filed, single sided courtesy copies must be received by the reviewing Examiner by no later than 12/9/19.

Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Chan. Not reported.
